name: tavily-web
description: Web search, content extraction, crawling, and research capabilities using Tavily API
qualityReason: Clear focus on extraction and crawling
capabilities: Search the web for current information using Tavily API
Get contextual answers from web sources
author: sickn33
securitySummary: All four static findings are false positives. The skill file (SKILL.md) is a simple markdown documentation file with no executable code. The scanner misidentified a bash installation command as 'Ruby/shell backtick execution', a GitHub URL as 'hardcoded URL', and falsely detected 'weak cryptographic algorithms' in plain text descriptions. This is a legitimate web search skill with no security concerns.
valueStatement: Enable your AI assistant to search the web, extract content from URLs, and perform research tasks using the Tavily API.
limitations: Requires a Tavily API key to function
API rate limits apply based on Tavily subscription
Only works within the Tavily API service endpoints
No local file system access for crawled content

useCases.title: Research Assistant
useCases.description: Search for current information and gather sources for research projects

useCases.title: Content Verification
useCases.description: Verify facts and get up-to-date information from the web

useCases.title: Technical Documentation Lookup
useCases.description: Find and extract information from technical documentation and APIs

promptTemplates.title: Basic Web Search
promptTemplates.prompt: Search the web for information about [TOPIC]
promptTemplates.scenario: When you need quick current information on a topic

promptTemplates.title: Extract URL Content
promptTemplates.prompt: Extract the main content from [URL] and summarize it
promptTemplates.scenario: When you need to get information from a specific webpage

promptTemplates.title: Deep Research
promptTemplates.prompt: Perform a deep research on [TOPIC], covering key aspects and sources
promptTemplates.scenario: When you need comprehensive research on a complex topic

promptTemplates.title: Compare Sources
promptTemplates.prompt: Search for multiple sources about [TOPIC] and compare their viewpoints
promptTemplates.scenario: When you need balanced information from different perspectives

bestPractices: Configure your Tavily API key via environment variables for security
Use specific search queries for more accurate results
Review extracted content for accuracy before using in important work
antiPatterns: Do not use for illegal content extraction or scraping protected sites
Avoid making excessive API calls that could hit rate limits
Do not rely solely on web search for critical factual information without verification

faq.question: How do I get a Tavily API key?
faq.answer: Visit the Tavily website to sign up for an account and obtain an API key. Configure it via environment variables as shown in the skill documentation.

faq.question: Can this skill bypass paywalls?
faq.answer: No. The skill only extracts publicly accessible content. Paywalled content cannot be accessed.

faq.question: How accurate are the search results?
faq.answer: Search quality depends on your query specificity and the Tavily API. More specific queries yield better results.

faq.question: Is there a rate limit?
faq.answer: Yes, Tavily has rate limits based on your subscription tier. Check Tavily documentation for details.

faq.question: Can I use this for commercial research?
faq.answer: Yes, as long as you comply with Tavily's terms of service and the website's terms of use for any content accessed.

faq.question: Does this work with all AI assistants?
faq.answer: This skill is designed for Claude, Codex, and Claude Code. Compatibility may vary with other AI assistants.
